fields.icd_description: Sprain of deltoid ligament, right ankle
fields.icd_conflict_detail: All three documents (referral form, prescription, and clinical notes) consistently report ICD-10 code S93.401A — Sprain of deltoid ligament, right ankle. No conflict detected.
fields.priority_reason: Ankle sprain is a non-acute, non-surgical musculoskeletal injury with standard mobility aid prescribed for partial weight bearing and short-term rehabilitation, representing low clinical risk.
fields.notes: 1. Adjuster email appears malformed (double domain: 'statefundi.com.com') — verify correct email address before sending correspondence. Case manager Brian Kim email (b.kim@statefundi.com.com) has the same likely typo. 2. Prescriber attestation statement is duplicated verbatim on page 2 — may indicate a form generation error, does not affect validity. 3. Clinical notes date (04/12/2026) is approximately 6 weeks after the referral date (03/03/2026) and over a month after authorization effective date (03/06/2026) — confirm clinical notes date is accurate and equipment has not already been dispensed. 4. Equipment re-evaluation scheduled for approximately May 9, 1–3pm per treatment plan. 5. Patient height is 6'5" and weight 160 lbs — verify standard crutch sizing is appropriate given tall/lean build.
